title: Incorrect use of index with LIKE operators when the LHS is a blob
bug_features_seed: SELECT 'query-3', y FROM t2 WHERE y LIKE UNHEX('61%');
SELECT 'query-4', y FROM t2 WHERE CAST(y AS CHAR) LIKE 'a%';
SELECT 'query-5', y FROM t2 WHERE y IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect index use with LIKE on blob data
